testpoints.name: fetch_tlb_miss_page_fault
testpoints.description: Fetch request with TLB miss: walkPageTable always faults, fetch_in_fault_o asserted

testpoints.name: fetch_request_with_icache_ready
testpoints.description: Fetch request when icache ready: fetch_out_rd_o sent to icache with translated address, fault also asserted

testpoints.name: lsu_load_tlb_miss_fault
testpoints.description: LSU load request with TLB miss: lsu_in_load_fault_o asserted, no dcache request

testpoints.name: lsu_store_tlb_miss_fault
testpoints.description: LSU store request with TLB miss: lsu_in_store_fault_o asserted

testpoints.name: fetch_flush_forwarding
testpoints.description: Fetch flush signal forwarded to icache: fetch_out_flush_o asserted

testpoints.name: fetch_invalidate_forwarding
testpoints.description: Fetch invalidate signal forwarded to icache: fetch_out_invalidate_o asserted

testpoints.name: lsu_flush_forwarding
testpoints.description: LSU flush signal forwarded to dcache: lsu_out_flush_o asserted

testpoints.name: lsu_invalidate_forwarding
testpoints.description: LSU invalidate signal forwarded to dcache: lsu_out_invalidate_o asserted

testpoints.name: lsu_writeback_forwarding
testpoints.description: LSU writeback signal forwarded to dcache: lsu_out_writeback_o asserted

testpoints.name: icache_response_forwarding
testpoints.description: Icache response forwarded to core: fetch_in_valid_o and fetch_in_inst_o match icache output

testpoints.name: dcache_response_forwarding
testpoints.description: Dcache response forwarded to LSU: lsu_in_ack_o, data_rd_o, resp_tag_o match dcache output

testpoints.name: tlb_flush_signal
testpoints.description: TLB flush signal asserted: all TLB entries invalidated

testpoints.name: fetch_request_with_error_forwarding
testpoints.description: Icache error response forwarded to core: fetch_in_error_o asserted

testpoints.name: lsu_cacheable_flag_low
testpoints.description: LSU request to non-cacheable address (outside range): lsu_out_cacheable_o=0

testpoints.name: lsu_cacheable_flag_high
testpoints.description: LSU request to cacheable address (within range): lsu_out_cacheable_o=1, TLB miss fault also asserted

testpoints.name: no_request_idle
testpoints.description: No fetch or LSU request: all outputs remain at default false/zero

testpoints.name: fetch_and_lsu_simultaneous
testpoints.description: Both fetch and LSU request in same cycle: both paths evaluated independently

testpoints.name: dcache_response_with_tag
testpoints.description: Dcache ack with specific response tag: tag forwarded correctly to LSU

testpoints.name: fetch_accept_not_set
testpoints.description: Fetch request without icache accept: fetch_out_rd_o not asserted, fault still set on TLB miss

testpoints.name: permission_check_priv_m_mode
testpoints.description: M-mode privilege (priv=3): permission check would always return true if TLB hit
